templates.title: Diun
templates.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry.
templates.note: Remember to set the container hostname that will be shown in notifications. Attach the diun.enable=true label to a service to receive notifications.
templates.name: diun

env.name: DIUN_WATCH_SCHEDULE
env.label: Schedule
env.description: CRON expression to schedule the update check.

env.name: DIUN_NOTIF_MAIL_SSL
env.label: SMTP SSL
env.description: Use a non empty value to enable SSL.

env.name: DIUN_NOTIF_MAIL_TO
env.label: Recipients email
env.description: Separate multiple recipents with comma.

templates.title: phpMyAdmin
templates.description: phpMyAdmin is a web-based tool for managing MySQL and MariaDB databases. This version exposes the application via Traefik.
templates.note: Attach the container to the Traefik network (do not expose any ports) and adjust the labels to match your system, particularly the domain name, which should match the domain specified in PMA_ABSOLUTE_URI. Access the application at path /phpmyadmin of the configured domain.
templates.name: phpmyadmin

env.name: PMA_ABSOLUTE_URI
env.label: Absolute URL
env.description: Required absolute URL of this istance.

env.name: PMA_HOST
env.label: Server address
env.description: Required address/host name of the MySQL server.

env.name: UPLOAD_LIMIT
env.label: Upload limit
env.description: Optional upload limit.

templates.title: Dozzle Agent
templates.description: Agent for Dozzle, an application with a web based interface to monitor Docker logs.
templates.name: dozzle-agent

env.name: DOZZLE_HOSTNAME
env.label: Agent name
env.description: Optiona agent name (shown on the UI).

templates.title: MySQL
templates.description: MySQL is a popular open-source relational database management system.
templates.note: Access the database from outside using the server domain and 3306 port.
templates.name: db

templates.title: Doctrine Volume Backup
templates.description: Backup Docker volumes locally or to any S3, WebDAV, Azure Blob Storage, Dropbox or SSH compatible storage.
templates.note: Remember to configure the remote storage using the configuration variables.

env.name: BACKUP_CRON_EXPRESSION
env.label: Backup frequency
env.description: The cron expression specifying how often backups should run.

env.name: BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS
env.label: Backup retention days
env.description: When configured, any archives older than this value will be rotated.

templates.title: Uptime Kuma
templates.description: Uptime Kuma is a self-hosted monitoring tool. This version exposes the app via Traefik.
templates.note: Attach the container to the Traefik network (do not expose any ports) and adjust the labels to match your system, particularly the domain name. Access the application at the configured domain.
templates.name: uptime-kuma

templates.title: Docker Autoheal
templates.description: Monitor and restart unhealthy docker containers.
templates.name: autoheal

env.name: AUTOHEAL_INTERVAL
env.label: Check interval
env.description: Check interval (in seconds).

templates.title: Dozzle
templates.description: Dozzle is an application with a web based interface to monitor Docker logs. This version exposes the application via Traefik.
templates.note: Attach the container to the Traefik network (do not expose any ports) and adjust the labels to match your system, particularly the domain name.
templates.name: dozzle

env.name: DOZZLE_REMOTE_AGENT
env.label: Remote agent
env.description: Address/host name and port or remote agents, comma separated.

templates.title: PostgreSQL
templates.description: PostgreSQL is an object-relational database management system (ORDBMS).
templates.note: Access the database from outside using the server domain and 5432 port.
templates.name: db

templates.title: MariaDB
templates.description: MariaDB is an open-source relational database, built as a MySQL alternative.
templates.note: Access the database from outside using the server domain and 3306 port.
templates.name: db

templates.title: Mercure
templates.description: Mercure is an open solution for real-time communications designed to be fast, reliable, and battery-efficient. This version exposes the application via Traefik.
templates.note: Attach the container to the Traefik network (do not expose any ports) and adjust the labels to match your system, particularly the domain name.
templates.name: mercure

templates.title: Shlink
templates.description: Shlink is a self-hosted URL shortener. This version exposes the API via Traefik (requires a running database).
templates.note: Attach the container to the Traefik network (do not expose any ports) and adjust the labels to match your system, particularly the domain name. Access the API at the configured domain. To generate an API key, run php bin/cli api-key:generate inside the Shlink container. Use this key with the configured domain in the Shlink app.

env.name: DB_DRIVER
env.label: Database driver
env.description: Required database driver.

env.name: DB_HOST
env.label: Database host
env.description: Required database host.

env.name: DB_USER
env.label: Database user
env.description: Required database user.

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: Database password
env.description: Required database password.

env.name: DB_NAME
env.label: Database name
env.description: Required database name.

templates.title: GTM server
templates.description: A GTM server processes tracking tags on the backend, improving data control, privacy, and performance. This version exposes the server via Traefik.
templates.note: Access the server at the subdomain sgtm of the configured domain. Access the preview server at the subdomain sgtm-preview of the configured domain.

env.name: DOMAIN
env.label: Domain
env.description: Required domain name (without http:// or https://).

env.name: CONTAINER_CONFIG
env.label: Container config
env.description: Required container configuration string.

env.name: TRAEFIK_NETWORK
env.label: Traefik network
env.description: Required Traefik network (must be created beforehand).

env.name: TRAEFIK_ENTRYPOINT
env.label: Traefik entrypoint
env.description: Required Traefik entrypoint (must be secure).

templates.title: Shlink (standalone)
templates.description: Shlink is a self-hosted URL shortener. This version exposes the API via Traefik and comes bundled with MariaDB and phpMyAdmin.
templates.note: Access the API at the configured domain. Access phpMyAdmin at the path /phpmyadmin using the shlink user or root, along with their respective configured passwords. To generate an API key, run php bin/cli api-key:generate inside the Shlink container. Use this key with the configured domain in the Shlink app. Backups are placed under the directory specified.

env.name: DOMAIN
env.label: Domain
env.description: Required domain name (without http:// or https://).

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: Database password
env.description: Required database password for shlink user.

env.name: DB_ROOT_PASSWORD
env.label: Database root password
env.description: Required database password for root user.

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Timezone (used for all containers).

env.name: SHLINK_TAG
env.label: Shlink version
env.description: The image tag to use for Shlink.

env.name: MARIADB_TAG
env.label: MariaDB version
env.description: The image tag to use for MariaDB.

env.name: BACKUP_FREQUENCY
env.label: Backup frequency
env.description: The cron expression specifying how often backups should run.

env.name: BACKUP_ROOT
env.label: Backup folder
env.description: The absolute path for storing backups.

env.name: TRAEFIK_NETWORK
env.label: Traefik network
env.description: Required Traefik network (must be created beforehand).

env.name: TRAEFIK_ENTRYPOINT
env.label: Traefik entrypoint
env.description: Required Traefik entrypoint (must be secure).

templates.title: EspoCRM (standalone)
templates.description: EspoCRM is an open-source web application for customer relationship management. This version exposes the app via Traefik and comes bundled with MariaDB and phpMyAdmin.
templates.note: Access the application at the configured domain using the credentials admin / password. Access phpMyAdmin at path /phpmyadmin with the espocrm user or root, using their respective configured passwords. Backups are placed under the directory specified.

env.name: DOMAIN
env.label: Domain
env.description: Required domain name (without http:// or https://).

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: Database password
env.description: Required database password for espcrm user.

env.name: DB_ROOT_PASSWORD
env.label: Database root password
env.description: Required database password for root user.

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Timezone (used for all containers).

env.name: ESPOCRM_TAG
env.label: EspoCRM version
env.description: The image tag to use for EspoCRM.

env.name: MYSQL_TAG
env.label: MySQL version
env.description: The image tag to use for MySQL.

env.name: BACKUP_FREQUENCY
env.label: Backup frequency
env.description: The cron expression specifying how often backups should run.

env.name: BACKUP_ROOT
env.label: Backup folder
env.description: The absolute path for storing backups.

env.name: TRAEFIK_NETWORK
env.label: Traefik network
env.description: Required Traefik network (must be created beforehand).

env.name: TRAEFIK_ENTRYPOINT
env.label: Traefik entrypoint
env.description: Required Traefik entrypoint (must be secure).

templates.title: BookStack (standalone)
templates.description: BookStack is an open-source platform for organizing documentation in a book-like structure. This version exposes the app via Traefik and comes bundled with MariaDB and phpMyAdmin.
templates.note: Generate the application key docker run -it --rm --entrypoint bash lscr.io/linuxserver/bookstack appkey. Access the application at the configured domain using the credentials admin@admin.com / password. Access phpMyAdmin at the path /phpmyadmin using the bookstack user or root, along with their respective configured passwords. Backups are placed under the directory specified.

env.name: DOMAIN
env.label: Domain
env.description: Required domain name (without http:// or https://).

env.name: APP_KEY
env.label: Application key
env.description: Required unique app key for encryption.

env.name: APP_LANG
env.label: Language
env.description: Optional application language.

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: Database password
env.description: Required database password for bookstack user.

env.name: DB_ROOT_PASSWORD
env.label: Database root password
env.description: Required database password for root user.

env.name: MAIL_ENCRYPTION
env.label: SMTP encryption
env.description: Connection encryption ("tls" or "null").

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Timezone (used for all containers).

env.name: BACKUP_FREQUENCY
env.label: Backup frequency
env.description: The cron expression specifying how often backups should run.

env.name: BACKUP_ROOT
env.label: Backup folder
env.description: The absolute path for storing backups.

env.name: BOOKSTACK_TAG
env.label: Bookstack version
env.description: The image tag to use for Bookstack.

env.name: MARIADB_TAG
env.label: MariaDB version
env.description: The image tag to use for MariaDB.

env.name: TRAEFIK_NETWORK
env.label: Traefik network
env.description: Required Traefik network (must be created beforehand).

env.name: TRAEFIK_ENTRYPOINT
env.label: Traefik entrypoint
env.description: Required Traefik entrypoint (must be secure).

templates.title: Rallly (standalone)
templates.description: Rallly is a tool for creating scheduling polls. This version exposes the API via Traefik and comes bundled with MariaDB and phpMyAdmin.
templates.note: Generate the application key openssl rand -base64 32. Access the application at the configured domain. Backups are placed under the directory specified.

env.name: DOMAIN
env.label: Domain
env.description: Required domain name (without http:// or https://).

env.name: APP_KEY
env.label: Application key
env.description: Required unique app key for encryption.

env.name: ALLOWED_EMAILS
env.label: Allowed emails
env.description: Email that are allowed to register, comma separated, wildcard support.

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: Database password
env.description: Required password for rallly user.

env.name: MAIL_SECURE
env.label: SMTP SSL
env.description: Use true to enable SSL.

env.name: SUPPORT_EMAIL
env.label: Support email
env.description: Required email for support queries.

env.name: NOREPLY_EMAIL
env.label: No-reply email
env.description: Optional email for all transactional emails (fallback to support email).

env.name: NOREPLY_EMAIL_NAME
env.label: No-reply name
env.description: Used as the sender name for all transactional emails.

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Timezone (used for all containers).

env.name: BACKUP_FREQUENCY
env.label: Backup frequency
env.description: The cron expression specifying how often backups should run.

env.name: BACKUP_ROOT
env.label: Backup folder
env.description: The absolute path for storing backups.

env.name: TRAEFIK_NETWORK
env.label: Traefik network
env.description: Required Traefik network (must be created beforehand).

env.name: TRAEFIK_ENTRYPOINT
env.label: Traefik entrypoint
env.description: Required Traefik entrypoint (must be secure).
